mapper.insert: INSERT INTO moment_notifications (user_id, sender_id, moment_id, type, content, is_read) VALUES (#{userId}, #{senderId}, #{momentId}, #{type}, #{content}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT mn.*, u.username as senderName, u.avatar as senderAvatar, m.media as momentImage, m.content as momentContent FROM moment_notifications mn JOIN user u ON mn.sender_id = u.id JOIN moments m ON mn.moment_id = m.id WHERE mn.user_id = #{userId} AND (mn.is_read = 0 OR mn.created_at > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)) ORDER BY mn.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM moment_notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE moment_notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.avatar FROM moment_notifications mn JOIN user u ON mn.sender_id = u.id WHERE mn.user_id = #{userId} AND mn.is_read = 0 ORDER BY mn.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
